text_preview:
* (see other report given by the same witness at this link: BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.661)

DEC 23rd, 2007. Time: 19h22pm. Duration: 10 seconds. A witness residing in the Parque Dez neighborhood, in the city of Manaus, State of Amazonas, reported the sighting of an unidentified flying object, that was “slow, [and] practically did not move”. The UFO was clear and luminous, being observed in a partially cloudy sky, and performed “a small lateral movement”. The witness also told COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] that he had some knowledge about UFOs and provided more details about the sight
summary: On Dec 23, 2007 a Manaus resident reported a slow gelatinous jelly-like luminous UFO emitting two bright flashes and making a slight lateral movement in a partly cloudy sky.
